assistantText:
Already equipped — `find-skills` has been in my skills list this whole time. It lives at `/opt/data/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md` and is fully loaded and ready.

This skill is about discovering skills from the open ecosystem using `npx skills find [query]` — it searches [skills.sh](https://skills.sh/) for installable skill packages (from Vercel, Anthropic, Microsoft, etc.).

It's ready to go whenever you want to find something. Want to search for a skill about something specific?
